title: Train Signals
description: Train Signals Can be used with other train mods, provide a manual alternative to most automatic signals.
body:
# Train Signals
**Train Signals** is a simple mod that adds blocks that can be used to direct trains/minecarts
# Overview
Train Signals Can be used with other train mods, and provide a manual alternative to most automatic signals.
# Reccomended
This mod is greatly recommended to be used with **[Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)**
# Blocks Added
- Red & Green signal
- Yellow & Green Signal
- Signaller Switch
# How to use blocks correctly
**Red & Green Signal:**
Connect the signal up to some Redstone, Power the block to make it green and de-power it to make it red again.

**Yellow & Green Signal**
Normally this block is used alone without a Red & Green Signal. Yellow signifies that the next signal ahead is red. Green signifies that the next signal should be green, again use Redstone to toggle this block.

**Signaller Switch**
The signaller switch is like a lever, ON means the signal would be red/yellow (Emits no Redstone) and OF means the signal would be Green.

# Known Errors


```
Mod File TrainSignalsV1.0.jar needs language provider javafml:45 or above to load
		We have found 43
```


**Occurs when trying to load in older versions**

------
